title: Yatra Hotels is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Yatra Hotels is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Guest Relations Manager with drive and ambition, Yatra Hotels in Gwalior is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Yatra Hotels:
Yatra Hotels is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Yatra Hotels!
